content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 — WARN — App is login-gated (`LoginView.swift` SecureField) with a subscription paywall, but `notes.txt` says only "n/a" with no steps to reach premium features.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need actionable notes to test gated functionality — a real reviewer account is provided (`demo_user.txt`/`demo_password.txt` look valid, not placeholders), but the notes don't explain how to reach the app blocking, schedules, or reports behind the `$4.99/month` paywall. This may trigger review questions or a rejection for incomplete review info; add steps describing how the reviewer should exercise the subscription-gated features (or confirm whether a demo bypass exists).
